summary: **Mechanism:** 7 adversarial Fable lenses -> refute-by-default verification per finding -> synthesis (workflow `wf_82f5f8d1-ca5`, 57 agents, ~4.9M tokens). **Date:** 2026-07-21. **Verdict:** NEEDS-REV3-THEN-CROSS-VENDOR | CRITICAL 3 / MAJOR 18 / MINOR 13. Does NOT substitute for the cross-vendor pass — see the reconciliation doc.
title: KOT-FAIR/2 Rev2 — Same-Vendor Fable Adversarial Re-Review
